name: controller_comparison_4max
description: Head-to-head comparison of TieredBotController vs HybridAIController vs rule_bots at a 4-max table. Tests whether the new tiered+math-floor stack wins, ties, or loses against the existing controllers under identical conditions.
hypothesis: Tiered bot beats deterministic rule_bots clearly and trades blows with HybridAI. The math floor protects against the pot-committed leak that previously cost Tesla and Louis XIV their stacks in live play.
